title: OJCP JobPosting
description: Schema for an OJCP job posting. Extends schema.org/JobPosting with agent-specific fields.

ojcp_id.description: Unique OJCP identifier for this job posting. RECOMMENDED format: {provider_domain}:{internal_id} (e.g., careers.acme.com:swe-42091).

employmentType.description: Type of employment. Standard values: full_time, part_time, contract, internship, temporary. Providers MAY use additional values (e.g., freelance, volunteer, apprenticeship). Note: schema.org uses UPPERCASE — OJCP normalizes to lowercase.

experienceLevel.description: Required experience level. Standard values: entry, mid, senior, lead, director, executive. Providers MAY use additional values.

skills_preferred.description: Skills that are preferred but not required.

team_context.description: Description of the team, reporting structure, and working environment.

urgency.description: How urgently the employer is looking to fill this role.

application_volume_signal.description: Relative volume of applications already received.

apply_paths.description: Available application mechanisms for this job.

requisition_id.description: Internal requisition or job ID used by the employer's ATS.

department.description: Department or business unit for this role.

remote_policy.description: Remote work policy for this role.

agent_notes.description: Free-text notes intended for agent consumption (e.g., recruiter info, timeline hints).

product_name.description: Optional vendor product name for this apply path (e.g., 'Adaptive Apply', 'Indeed Apply', 'Easy Apply').

url.description: URL for the application entry point.

ats_provider.description: Name of the ATS provider (e.g., Workday, Greenhouse, Lever).

estimated_completion_minutes.description: Estimated time to complete the application in minutes.

required_fields.description: Fields required to submit the application.

optional_fields.description: Optional fields that can strengthen the application.

supports_agent_submission.description: Whether this apply path supports fully autonomous agent submission.

form_skill_url.description: URL to a form skill descriptor that teaches agents how to fill out this apply path's form — field mappings, validation rules, conditional logic, and submission instructions.

requires_verification.description: Whether identity verification is required before the application can be submitted via this path.

accepted_verifiers.description: Identity verifier identifiers accepted for this apply path (e.g., 'id.me', 'clear'). If omitted when requires_verification is true, the provider accepts any verifier listed in the manifest's supported_verifiers.
